question: A 2 kg block is pushed across a frictionless surface with a constant force of 10 N. What is its acceleration?
A car travels around a circular track of radius 50 m at a constant speed of 20 m/s. What is its centripetal acceleration?
A 5 kg object is lifted vertically 3 m at constant speed. How much work is done by gravity?
A spring has a force constant k = 200 N/m. How much potential energy is stored when it is compressed 0.1 m?
A 1500 kg car accelerates from rest to 30 m/s in 10 s. What is the average power output if the car’s engine provides the net work?
A 0.5 kg ball is thrown upward with an initial speed of 20 m/s. What is its maximum height?
A 10 N horizontal force acts on a 4 kg block on a surface with kinetic friction coefficient 0.2. What is the acceleration?
A 3 kg object moves in a straight line with velocity v(t) = 4t^2. What is the net force at t = 2 s?
A 2 kg mass attached to a string moves in a circle of radius 1.5 m with period 2 s. What is the tension in the string?
A 60 W lamp is turned on for 5 minutes. How much electrical energy does it consume?
